# glslpp — Status

Single source of truth for test/conformance counts. Regenerate with
`just update-status`; verify with `just status` (re-runs the suites and
fails if the committed docs drift). Numbers below come from a real run of
`zig build test`, `zig build test-hlsl`, and `zig build conformance`.

## Conformance (`zig build conformance` — spirv-val oracle)

**2,080 PASS / 7 FAIL / 8 SKIP / 2,095 TOTAL** (2,087 runnable = pass + known fails).

The suite exits non-zero while the 7 known feature-gap fails remain — these are pre-existing capability gaps, **not regressions** (see list below).

| Suite | Pass | Fail | Skip |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| glslang-430 | 20 | 2 | 7 |
| spirv-cross | 1545 | 5 | 0 |
| ghostty | 9 | 0 | 1 |
| mesh-task | 4 | 0 | 0 |
| ray-tracing | 3 | 0 | 0 |
| compute | 13 | 0 | 0 |
| geometry | 16 | 0 | 0 |
| tessellation | 13 | 0 | 0 |
| stress | 457 | 0 | 0 |

## Known feature-gap conformance fails (not regressions)

Source of truth: [`tests/known-conformance-fails.txt`](../tests/known-conformance-fails.txt). A failing fixture not on this list aborts `gen-status` as a regression.

| Fixture | Reason |
|---|---|
| `tests/glslang-430/newTexture.frag` | OpExtInst word-count on new-form texture builtins |
| `tests/glslang-430/spv.newTexture.frag` | OpExtInst word-count on new-form texture builtins |
| `tests/spirv-cross/fp64.desktop.comp` | 64-bit float (fp64) type not modelled (honest gap) |
| `tests/spirv-cross/int64.desktop.comp` | 64-bit int (int64) type not modelled (honest gap) |
| `tests/spirv-cross/ray_sphere_test.frag` | feature gap — produces SPIR-V spirv-val rejects |
| `tests/spirv-cross/shader_ballot.comp` | subgroup ballot feature gap |
| `tests/spirv-cross/struct-material.frag` | feature gap — produces SPIR-V spirv-val rejects |
